MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANT NASIR PATEL'S MOTION TO CONTINUE AND CONSOLIDATE THE TRIAL OF DEFENDANT NASIR PATEL. STEPHEN LEONARD COLLIER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. STEPHEN LEONARD COLLIER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT NASIR PATEL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/9/12 IS CONTINUED TO 2/19/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL STATUTORY DEADLINES TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE SHALL BE HEARD IN THE LAW AND MOTION DEPARTMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: J. ROQUE/R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
